---
title: "02_descriptives"
author: "Sglatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Packages
```{r packages}
if (!require("dplyr")) {
  install.packages("dplyr")
  require("dplyr")
}
if (!require("tidyr")) {
  install.packages("tidyr")
  require("tidyr")
}
if (!require("psych")) {
  install.packages("psych")
  require("psych")
}
if (!require("ggplot2")) {
  install.packages("ggplot2")
  require("ggplot2")
}
```

# Folders for output 
```{r output folders, eval=FALSE}
if (!dir.exists("02_output")) {
  dir.create("02_output")
}
```

# Import data from 01_data
```{r import data}
combined_df_all <- read.csv("01_output/All_merged/ALEXIS_all_merged_sg_2026-05-08.csv")
combined_df_mid <- read.csv("01_output/All_merged/ALEXIS_mid_merged_sg_2026-05-08.csv")
colnames(combined_df_mid)
```

# How many non-missing EMA slider values per person is there in the mid merged dataset?
```{r non-missing}
# EMA slider variables
slider_cols <- grep("SLIDER", names(combined_df_mid), value = TRUE)

# Count of non-NA
slider_counts <- combined_df_mid %>%
  select(subject_id, all_of(slider_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-subject_id, names_to = "item", values_to = "value") %>%
  group_by(subject_id, item) %>%
  summarise(
    n_non_missing = sum(!is.na(value)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

slider_counts
# Looks like the 6 EMA sliders that everyone filled out are anxious, disgusted, embarrassed, happy, sad, and irritated.
# Some are missing for all people, like feeling tired, overall today

# Save the slider counts
write.csv(slider_counts,
  file = paste0("02_output/EMA_slider_vars_count_sg_", format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d"), ".csv"),
  row.names = TRUE
) 
```

# Visualize the EMA slider variables over time for each person (day-beep)
```{r visualize}
# Reformat the data for plotting
ema_long <- combined_df_mid %>%
  select(subject_id, 
         day, beep, 
         ANXIOUS_SLIDER, Disgusted_SLIDER, EMBARRASSED_SLIDER, HAPPY_SLIDER, SAD_SLIDER, IRRITATED_SLIDER) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ANXIOUS_SLIDER, Disgusted_SLIDER, EMBARRASSED_SLIDER, HAPPY_SLIDER, SAD_SLIDER, IRRITATED_SLIDER),
    names_to = "item",
    values_to = "value"
  )

# Visualize
ggplot(ema_long, aes(x = beep, y = value, color = factor(subject_id))) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subject_id, item)), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ item, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "EMA Slider Trajectories (MID)",
    x = "Beep",
    y = "Rating",
    color = "Participant"
  )

# Save trajectories
ggsave(
  filename = paste0("02_output/EMA_slider_trajectories_sg_", format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d"), ".png"),
  width = 12,
  height = 8
)
```
